response: emily runs a dog rescue center and currently has 25 dogs. on thursday, she received 4 puppies from a nearby town. on friday, a family brought in a stray dog they had found. on saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each. the total number of dogs in the rescue center can be calculated by adding the number of dogs received and adopted. the initial number of dogs is 25. on thursday, 4 puppies were added, bringing the total to 29. on friday, 1 dog was added, bringing the total to 30. on saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, which is 6 dogs. the total number of dogs in the rescue center is now 30 - 6 = 24. the number of dogs in the rescue center is [24]. *** the current number of dogs in the rescue center is [24]. the number of dogs in the rescue center is [24].
